settings.subtext: Born from the terraces. Built for every nation. World1World is the accessory that travels as far as the beautiful game itself.

settings.heading: Born on the Terraces
settings.body:
Every great movement starts with a single moment of clarity. Ours came during the 2022 World Cup — watching fans from every corner of the planet wave their colors with unmatched pride.

We asked ourselves: what if that pride could travel on your wrist every single day?

settings.heading: Built on Three Pillars
settings.subtext: Every decision we make — from materials to markets — comes back to these core beliefs.

settings.title: Global Community
settings.description: Football is the world's language. We make something every fan on every continent can wear with pride.

settings.title: Elite Craft
settings.description: Pro-grade paracord. Military-spec hardware. Every bead and knot engineered to outlast the season.

settings.title: Match Day Energy
settings.description: We don't make jewelry. We make fuel — the wristband you put on before kick-off and never take off.

settings.heading: Engineered for the Game
settings.body:
We obsessed over every millimeter. Military-grade 550 paracord, stainless steel hardware, and color palettes pulled directly from national kits — every World1World bracelet is built to last from the opening whistle to the final tournament.

Stack them. Mix them. Wear your lineage on your wrist.

settings.quote: The game belongs to everyone. So does the kit. $5 a nation. Stack your squad. Wear the world.
